---
#title: "Shannon Fernandes"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpeg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shannonfernandes
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      url: https://github.com/shannonfernandes
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      url: mailto:shannon@example.com
    
---

## 👋 Bio

I’m Shannon — psychologist, coder, and writer. I create thoughtful tools, analyze brains, and write about consciousness, creativity, and cognition.

I work at the intersection of clinical psychology, computation, and design. My projects range from psychometric test platforms to fMRI analysis in Python, from philosophical writing to code that builds psychological insight.

---

## 🎓 Education

- **M.A. Psychology** — Clinical and Theoretical Emphasis  
- **B.A. Philosophy & Psychology** — Dual Major  
- **Certificate in Computational Neuroscience** — Coursera/Stanford  

---

## 💼 Work

- Founder — *Psymoat* (psychometric automation)
- Visiting Faculty — Clinical Psychology
- Consultant — Behavioral Research + Product Design

---

## 🎯 Interests



<div class="interests-grid">

::: {.interest-card}
![Psychology](images/psychology.jpg)
[**Psychology**](interests/psychology.qmd)
:::

::: {.interest-card}
![Coding](images/coding.jpg)
[**Coding**](interests/coding.qmd)
:::

::: {.interest-card}
![Writing](images/writing.jpg)
[**Writing**](interests/writing.qmd)
:::

::: {.interest-card}
![Design](images/design.jpg)
[**Design**](interests/design.qmd)
:::

</div>
